payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped corner of a dark inset sink basin recessed into a light-colored tiled countertop with visible grout lines; the rim and shadowed interior are visible (appears metallic or glazed), only a small portion of the basin is shown — estimated distance from camera ~0.7 m.

message.content: {"label":"sink","short_description":"partial dark inset sink corner","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped corner of a dark inset sink basin recessed into a light-colored tiled countertop with visible grout lines; the rim and shadowed interior are visible (appears metallic or glazed), only a small portion of the basin is shown — estimated distance from camera ~0.7 m.","attributes":["partial","edge-cropped","corner visible","dark basin interior","inset sink","light tiled countertop","visible grout lines","rim visible","shadowed interior"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
